items.prompt: ConfigDB set/get is mainly used to…
choices: Pass configuration like virtual interfaces and modes by hierarchy path
items.explain: ConfigDB shares typed settings across the component tree.

items.prompt: When multiple sets match a get, which wins?
choices: The longest (most specific) matching path wins
The first set in random order
items.explain: More specific hierarchy paths override broader parent sets.

items.prompt: A get for field `vif` misses when…
choices: Only `is_active` was set at that path
Any set exists anywhere in the testbench
items.explain: Field names must match exactly for a successful get.

items.prompt: A driver under env.agent1 can get a vif set only on env.agent0.
items.explain: Sibling subtrees do not walk into each other; walk-up is within your ancestry.
